title: Link monday_docs to boards and items
excerpt: Please add the option to link monday_docs to boards and items. Or, I am looking to add notes to a board beyond the board description, not just the items in the board. Thank you for considering.

posts.author: CTBell (Cameron Bell)
posts.cookedHtml: Please add the option to link monday_docs to boards and items. Or, I am looking to add notes to a board beyond the board description, not just the items in the board. Thank you for considering.
